title: viola × hortorum
intro: Viola × hortorum, also known as the garden violet, is a hybrid species of flowering plant that combines characteristics from Viola sororia and Viola papilionacea. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Viola × hortorum include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and provide relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Viola × hortorum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
